acceptanceCriteria.description: ArtifactStore interface implemented with content-addressed FS backend

context.goal: Implement the ArtifactStore (Memory Pointer pattern): content-addressed local FS backend, put/get/excerpt, applied to tool outputs over 8KB.

notes.decisions: local FS backend under .chikory/artifacts, sharded by hash prefix

context.planItem: Implement put() with sha256 content addressing
recentSteps: step 1: scaffolded ArtifactStore module and test file

instruction: Implement put() with sha256 content addressing and a round-trip test.
